choices.text: Solved double-spending without trusted third party. Combines Proof of Work (costly block creation), chained timestamps, longest-chain rule. Probabilistic finality after enough blocks. Trustless digital cash.

questions.explanation: PoW + chained timestamps + longest chain = trustless ledger.

choices.text: Block reward halves every 210,000 blocks (~4 years). Started at 50 BTC; geometric series converges to ~21M total. Hard cap enforced by every full node; changing requires near-impossible consensus.
